channel.title: KillBait RSS Feed
channel.description: KillBait - News highlights delivered clearly and responsibly—no clickbait, no sensationalism

item.title: Aliko Dangote Makes TIME 100 List For 2026 Alongside Global Leaders
item.description: Industrialist and philanthropist Aliko Dangote don dey among TIME Magazine top 100 most influential people for 2026. This na him second time for the list, first one na for 2014. Dangote dey join big n...

item.title: KLM Officials Booked Following Complaint Over Boarding Pass Denial at Bengaluru Airport
item.description: Bengaluru authorities have booked officials of KLM Royal Dutch Airlines after a complaint from J.S. Sathish Kumar, chairman of Annapoorna Medical College and Hospitals in Tamil Nadu, alleging that his...

item.title: IMF warns Africa’s economic recovery is losing momentum due to global and structural challenges
item.description: The International Monetary Fund (IMF) has issued a warning that sub-Saharan Africa’s recent economic progress is being threatened by growing global instability, mounting debt, and shrinking developmen...

item.title: Family of Irma Palasics speaks of relief as two men found guilty of her manslaughter in 26‑year‑old Canberra cold case
item.description: The family of Irma Palasics, a Canberra grandmother who was killed in a brutal home invasion in 1999, has spoken of relief and gratitude after two Melbourne men were found guilty of her manslaughter b...

item.title: Lawmakers Called to Invest in Sanitation and Clean Water for Health Facilities
item.description: Members of Parliament in Tanzania have been encouraged to give more attention to investment in water, sanitation, and hygiene (WASH) services within health facilities, after growing concerns about uns...

item.title: Queen Elizabeth II remains the UK's most admired royal, with strong public support for the monarchy
item.description: A recent YouGov poll has revealed that Queen Elizabeth II continues to be the most popular member of the British royal family, even more than three years after her passing at the age of 96. Approximat...

item.title: Five Haryana Congress MLAs suspended for voting against party line in Rajya Sabha polls
item.description: The Congress party in Haryana has suspended five of its Members of the Legislative Assembly (MLAs) for allegedly engaging in cross-voting during the Rajya Sabha elections held in March. The legislator...

item.title: Cast of “Blood vs Duty” discuss their roles and character dynamics
item.description: The lead actors of the upcoming ABS-CBN series “Blood vs Duty” share insights on how they relate to and differ from their characters. In interviews, stars such as Richard Gutierrez, Gerald Anderson, B...

item.title: Sotheby's to Auction Over 300 Vintage Cartier Watches, Including Rare 1987 London Crash
item.description: A remarkable collection of more than 300 vintage Cartier timepieces, assembled over 25 years by an anonymous collector, is heading to Sotheby's auction. The highlight is a rare 1987 yellow gold Cartie...

item.title: Parliament Clears Mediheal Hospital of Organ Trafficking Allegations and Calls for Stronger Transplant Laws
item.description: A parliamentary committee in Kenya has fully cleared Mediheal Group of Hospitals of any claims of organ trafficking following a long investigation into their kidney transplant services at the Eldoret ...

item.title: Punjab Assembly Passes Resolution Recommending Nobel Peace Prize for PM Shehbaz Sharif and CDF Asim Munir
item.description: The Punjab Assembly on Thursday unanimously passed a resolution recommending the Nobel Peace Prize for Prime Minister Shehbaz Sharif and Chief of Defence Forces (CDF) and Chief of Army Staff Field Mar...

item.title: Creamline Cool Smashers Reach PVL All-Filipino Conference Finals with Strong Team Performance
item.description: In the Premier Volleyball League (PVL) All-Filipino Conference, the Creamline Cool Smashers have successfully advanced to the finals after a commendable performance in the semifinals. Setter Jia de Gu...

item.title: Nasarawa Governor Abdullahi Sule Endorses Senator Aliyu Wadada as APC Governorship Candidate for 2027
item.description: Nasarawa State Governor, Abdullahi Sule, don officially endorse Senator Aliyu Wadada as him preferred candidate to succeed am for governorship under the All Progressives Congress (APC) ahead of the 20...

item.title: Europe faces jet fuel shortage in six weeks amid ongoing Iran conflict
item.description: Europe is facing a potential jet fuel shortage, with only around six weeks of supply left due to the ongoing conflict involving Iran. Fatih Birol, executive director of the International Energy Agency...

item.title: Abbott adjusts 2026 earnings forecast after Exact Sciences acquisition
item.description: Abbott Laboratories lowered its 2026 profit forecast following its US$23‑billion acquisition of cancer diagnostics maker Exact Sciences, which reduced projected earnings by about US$0.20 per share. Th...

item.title: Governor Abdullahi Sule Endorses Senator Aliyu Wadada for 2027 APC Governorship Ticket
item.description: Governor Abdullahi Sule of Nasarawa State don officially announce say Senator Aliyu Wadada na im preferred candidate for All Progressives Congress (APC) governorship ticket for 2027 election. This ann...

item.title: Museveni Did Not Advise Ruto to Harm Opposition Leaders, Social Media Graphics Fake
item.description: There has been a lot of talk on social media claiming that Ugandan President Yoweri Museveni told Kenyan President William Ruto to deal with opposition leaders using 'some lethal force.' These claims ...

item.title: Shifts in U.S. Political Support for Israel Amid Policy Controversies
item.description: The longstanding consensus of uncritical U.S. political support for Israel is undergoing a significant transformation. Historically, backing Israel was politically safe and reinforced across parties d...

item.title: Russian drone and missile strikes kill 16 in Ukraine, including a child
item.description: Ukraine experienced its deadliest assault of 2026 as Russian drone and missile strikes hit Kyiv and other cities, leaving at least 16 dead and dozens more injured. The attacks included the death of a ...

item.title: Delhi CM Highlights Benefits of Women Reservation Bill for Political Representation and Leadership
item.description: Delhi Chief Minister Rekha Gupta emphasised the importance of the Women Reservation Bill in promoting greater political representation and decision-making power for women during an interaction organis...
